sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37499" key="e)coine/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξοιν-έω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οἶνος</etym>) <sense id="n37499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be tipsy,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>, Poll <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:6:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n37499.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">get sober,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:1:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
